description: A Java utility library project 'todo-utils' is open in IntelliJ IDEA. The project contains two classes — StringUtils.java and MathUtils.java — with 6 methods that have full Javadoc specifications but only stub implementations marked with // TODO: Implement this method. Complete the implementation of isPalindrome, countWords, and reverseWords in StringUtils.java, and gcd, isPrime, and factorial in MathUtils.java according to their Javadoc. Remove the // TODO comments and ensure the project compiles and all 18 tests pass without modifying the test files.
